author: anon-59ff128d
content: Plan: Replace byte-offset slicing in case-insensitive literal matching with regex-based approach using regex::escape() + (?i) flag. This delegates all Unicode casing to the regex engine, which handles it correctly. Affects matcher.rs (Matcher::replace and Matcher::is_match) and engine.rs (apply_transform). The current code computes byte offsets in the lowercased string and uses them to index the original, which breaks when to_lowercase() changes byte length (e.g. Turkish İ).
